# Rule: msisdn
# Category: telecom
# Jurisdiction: global
#
# Preserves the first 2 and last 4 digits of a 10-15 digit MSISDN;
# inputs with a leading `+` fail closed — use `phone_number` for E.164
# input. Example: 447911123456 → 44******3456.
